channel.title: On the List — The Journal
channel.description: Process notes and behind-the-scenes posts from the On the List series.

item.title: The Best Deutsche Rappers: 5 Artists Who Built Modern German Rap
item.description: A guide to the best Deutsche rappers — Kollegah, Kitty Kat, Capital Bra, Apache 207 and Sido — with their biggest videos and where to follow them.

item.title: Writing the Night the Door Opens
item.description: A behind-the-scenes look at drafting the opening chapter of On the List: Book One.
